--- How to choose the correct version? --- 

Recommended: "web-components-imperative"

--- Full list of options: --- 

"traditional": Not recommended unless needing to support very old browsers or for use with a framework that does not support the other approaches.
"web-components-declarative": No JavaScript is required. Highest performance. Is not affected by page CSS rules.
"web-components-imperative": Javascript is required. Most compact approach. Easy to have multiple buttons on one page. Is not affected by page CSS rules.
"window": Javascript is required. Pop up window option. Decreased reliability due to pop up.
